topics.title: Failed Negotiations and Concert Experiences
topics.summary: The studio discusses a failed negotiation with George Takei, an upcoming film festival involving Fred Durst, and a recent concert experience featuring the Allman Brothers.

topics.title: Film Set Experiences and Celebrity Encounters
topics.summary: The studio discusses personal anecdotes regarding gambling habits, interactions with actresses like Renee Zellweger and Mary McCormick during film productions, and the dynamics of various radio segments.

topics.title: Media Criticism and New Programming Announcements
topics.summary: The studio discusses a critic's dismissive article regarding legal battles with CBS, reviews recent television episodes, and announces upcoming programming changes and new staff members.

topics.title: Comedy Tour Incident and Guest Lineup
topics.summary: The studio discusses a comedian's intoxicated performance in Arizona, the upcoming guest lineup for the show, and a listener's inquiry regarding a subscription milestone.

topics.title: Leprechaun Sightings and Celebrity Interviews
topics.summary: The show features a discussion regarding reports of a leprechaun in Alabama followed by an interview with actor Wilmer Valderrama about his career and personal life.

topics.title: Celebrity Relationships and Personal Experiences
topics.summary: The studio features a guest who recounts his experiences dating various celebrities, including Lindsay Lohan and Mandy Moore, while discussing the realities of life in the entertainment industry.

topics.title: Wilmer Valderrama's MTV Show and Career
topics.summary: The studio features Wilmer Valderrama discussing his upcoming MTV show "Yo Yo Yo Mama," his experiences dating high-profile actresses, and his career in the film industry.

topics.title: Celebrity Interactions and Animal Rights
topics.summary: The studio features discussions regarding celebrity relationships, the upcoming premiere of Wilma Valderrama's show, and commentary on animal rights and the FCC.

topics.title: FCC Fines and Celebrity News
topics.summary: The show covers the FCC's stance on profanity, a fatal racing accident involving a friend of David Letterman, plastic surgery complications for Star Jones, and various celebrity rumors regarding Elvis Presley, Clay Aiken, and Brad Pitt.

topics.title: Reality Show Casting and Guest Interviews
topics.summary: The studio discusses the casting of women for a television show and transitions into an interview with a guest regarding her personal life.

topics.title: Playmate Experiences and Sexual Advice
topics.summary: The studio features guests discussing their personal dating rules, health concerns, and experiences at the Playboy Mansion while providing advice on sexual techniques.

topics.title: New Host Introduction and Sports Betting
topics.summary: The studio welcomes Pharrell to the Howard 101 lineup while discussing sports betting, gambling news, and upcoming show segments.

topics.title: Scott Pharrell Joins Howard 100
topics.summary: The studio welcomes Scott Pharrell as a new full-time team member for the evening show and discusses his transition from independent radio to the network.

topics.title: Current Events and Media Industry News
topics.summary: The studio discusses various topics including local radio programming updates, reports of child neglect cases in Indiana and New York, celebrity news regarding Oprah Winfrey and Jennifer Aniston, a fatal racing accident, immigration debates, the conflict in Iraq, and the competitive landscape between Sirius and XM satellite radio.

topics.title: Middle East Conflict and Domestic News
topics.summary: The studio discusses the geopolitical situation in Afghanistan and Iraq, reports on a Tennessee shooting involving a Polish minister's wife, and covers local news including missing children in Wisconsin and the designation of Graceland as a national landmark.
